name: Autonomous Procurement Agent
tagline: Zero-leak quote parsing with dual-engine AI. F1/F2/F3 fraud detection built in.
shortDescription: Enterprise procurement automation with hybrid dual-engine parsing (regex + GPT-4o), built-in F1/F2/F3 fraud detection, auto-escalation approval flows, Safety-Freeze circuit breakers, and Lemon Squeezy MoR payment.
description:
The procurement agent that actually understands messy supplier quotes. Engine 1 (regex pipeline, ms response) handles structured JSON, HTML tables, and CSV. Engine 2 (GPT-4o LLM fallback) handles plain-text emails, OCR scans, and qty×price-on-same-line ambiguity.

**Every result carries risk metadata:**
- F1: unit_price × quantity ≠ line_total → calculation error detected, auto-block
- F2: current price > historical avg × 1.20 → price spike flagged
- F3: same vendor, same total, within 7 days → duplicate warning

**Approval flow with Safety-Freeze:**
- Under $10,000 limit: auto-approved instantly
- Over limit: emails primary approver → 5s timeout → escalates to backup
- Both unreachable: Safety-Freeze + emergency alert + order locked

**Lemon Squeezy MoR:** Global VAT/Sales Tax handled by LS. Payout via Payoneer/Wise/WorldFirst — no Stripe, no PayPal disputes.

**Handles formats others can't:**
- Email body: "Servo motor SME-200: 8 units × $2,800 = $22,400" (qty and price on same line)
- SAP-exported HTML with merged cells
- Chinese RMB quotes auto-converted to USD
- Multi-currency: CNY, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, CAD → normalized USD

pro.description: 500 quotes/month, LLM fallback, all F1/F2/F3 checks

enterprise.description: Unlimited quotes, multi-currency, API access, priority support

features: Dual-engine parsing: regex (ms) + GPT-4o LLM fallback for messy formats
F1 calculation verification: unit_price × quantity vs line_total
F2 historical price spike: current > avg × 1.20 triggers CRITICAL alert
F3 duplicate detection: same vendor + same total within 7 days
Every result: confidence_score, risk_score, anomaly_flags, risk_alerts
Approval flow: auto-approve under limit → email primary → escalate backup → Safety-Freeze
Safety-Freeze: both approvers unreachable → emergency alert + order locked
Lemon Squeezy MoR: global VAT handled, payouts via Payoneer/Wise/WorldFirst
Zero hardcoded keys: all secrets from process.env
useCases: Manufacturing: Compare 5 supplier quotes in different formats (PDF/email/Excel)
IT procurement: Auto-detect $10 × 100 units = $50,000 calculation error
Medical supply: Flag 34% price spike on ball bearings vs 6-month history
Operations: Auto-escalate $50,000 purchase to CFO, Safety-Freeze if unreachable
